name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Hyperstone Heist
aliases: Teenage Mutant Hero Turtles: The Hyperstone Heist
Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Return of the Shredder

backlog.reason: Major Mega Drive TMNT beat 'em up and strong counterpart to Turtles in Time.

acquisition.reason: Essential Sega-side TMNT representation within Cowabunga Collection.

description: Mega Drive beat 'em up where the Ninja Turtles fight Shredder after Manhattan is shrunk by the Hyperstone.
